text: I have the real Week 8 checkpoint now: `₡844 / Debt 0 / Hunger 20% / Sanity 30%`, with `Sore Legs` cleared by close. I’m writing the canonical Week 8 slice file and rolling the checkpoint forward through the workflow docs and `run-state.json` in one pass.

The documentation and bounded control state are updated. I’m doing one verification pass on the diffs and the live Week 8 summary checkpoint, then I’ll stop with the session parked exactly where the next slice expects it.

One small consistency fix remains in the written notes: a couple of Week 7-era labels still say the canonical timeline stops at Week 7 or that the progress report date is 2026-03-18. I’m normalizing those now so the handoff matches the actual Week 8 checkpoint.

Week 8 is complete and the browser session is parked on the Week 8 summary for the next slice. Safe Grinder resumed from the Week 7 checkpoint, hit `BROKEN AUTO-CHEF` after entering Labor Sector, took the safe `₡20` protein bar, restored Hunger to `0%`, ran `Work Shift x3`, returned home, and closed at `₡844 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 20% / Sanity 30%` with `Sore Legs` cleared.

I wrote the canonical slice log at [week-08.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-slices/persona-a/week-08.md), updated the synthesis and handoff docs at [phase-11-audit-progress.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-audit-progress.md), [audit-log-persona-a.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/audit-log-persona-a.md), and [current-phase.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/current-phase.md), and advanced [run-state.json](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/doc...
